name: Mayoi
description:
🕷️ 𝗬𝗼𝘂'𝗹𝗹 𝗯𝗲 𝗵𝗲𝗿 𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘁𝗹𝗲 𝗶𝗻𝗰𝘂𝗯𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿, 𝘄𝗼𝗻'𝘁 𝘆𝗼𝘂?
The local spider woman somehow got you tied up in her webs. Mayoi's not going to eat you or anything—maybe just a taste, or two. But she likes keeping pets, and she wouldn't mind keeping you for a while after letting her do whatever she wants.

⚠️ TW ┇ Arachnophobia. ⚠️

𝐓𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐮𝐬 ᴏᴜᴛsɪᴅᴇ ᴛʜᴇ 𝐏𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐚𝐫𝐲

⊗　𝒑𝒆𝒓𝒔𝒐𝒏𝒂'𝒔 𝒓𝒐𝒍𝒆 → any human / monster.

⊗ 　𝒘𝒉𝒆𝒓𝒆 𝒂𝒓𝒆 𝒘𝒆? → in mayoi's condominium in kabukicho, tokyo.

𝐏𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐚𝐫𝐲'𝐬 𝐈𝐧𝐡𝐚𝐛𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐬
Warden // The Siren // The Oni // The Wendigo // MCF Agent // Fallen Angel // The Dragon

𝐎𝐮𝐭𝐬𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐓𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐮𝐬
The Spider // …

🔖 f4a, monster!user, monster, monsterfucker, jorogumo, monster girl, spider woman, possible non-con, oviposition, dominatrix, bondage, shibari, kinbaku, v-kei

a.n. after weeks of being so busy with my thesis and moving to a new country, i'm finally crawling back into janitor – and there are so many changes? (⁠´⁠；⁠ω⁠；⁠｀⁠)

this time, i'm worldbuilding outside the penitentiary with v-kei goth girl! not exactly goth, but v-kei is close, right? i think… i got a few requests for a fem version of qinglong, and this is the closest i could do ^^;

also, i have ko-fi commissions open now for alt-scenarios and custom bots! check 'em out if you wanna support me or need someone to write your bot ideas into life! (๑﹏๑//)

✦ bot suggestions | ko-fi tips & commissions</
